subcodes.first_line: O Fadl'u'llah! Upon thee be the glory of God, His loving-kindness and His grace. These are blessed days and precious times from God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا فضل الله علیک بهاء الله و عنایته و فضله ایام مبارک و وقت عزیز از حق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for opponents; enemies of the Faith
